bibliographic_info.title: Real-time single-frequency precise point positioning using BDS-3 PPP-B2b corrections

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement205(2022)112178 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement Real-time single-frequency precise point positioning using BDS-3 PPP-B2b corrections Haitao Zhoua,b, Lei Wanga,b,c,*, Wenju Fua, Yi Hana, Tao Lia, Wei Lia, Ruizhi Chena,c aState Key Laboratory of Information Engineering in Surveying, Mapping and R

The performance of the BDS-3 PPP-B2b services for dual- Single-frequency frequency precise point positioning (PPP) has been investigated, while how the PPP-B2b service benefits the Precise point positioning single-frequency (SF) users has not been investigated yet.
